arguments.argument: Preserving the original text as submitted is the most appropriate course of action. Correcting the spelling errors could inadvertently compromise the whistleblower's anonymity, potentially putting them at risk of retaliation or retribution. The authenticity of the document, although important, should not take precedence over the safety and well-being of the individual who courageously came forward to report serious safety violations.
